sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system documentation available for Tier 2 source

special_mechanics.name: Pepelogoo Double-Jump
special_mechanics.description: By holding onto Pepelogoo (pet companion), player can perform a double-jump or extend jump height

special_mechanics.name: Pepelogoo Descent Slowdown
special_mechanics.description: Holding onto Pepelogoo during descent slows fall speed via his flying ability

special_mechanics.name: Mid-Air Sword Combat
special_mechanics.description: Asha can swing sword upward, downward, and forward while in midair depending on directional input

special_mechanics.name: Shield Hold
special_mechanics.description: Asha can hold shield while standing (down input) for defense

tier_notes: Tier 2: Only qualitative gameplay mechanics documented. Wikipedia source provides gameplay mechanics description but no quantitative physics parameters (speeds, gravity values, acceleration rates). Numerical movement data not available in public documentation.
